Hermès Atlas 35 Handbag - Chestnut Brown with Silver Hardware

Product Details:
Brand: Hermès
Model: Atlas 35
Material: Taurillon Clemence (TC) Leather
Color: Chestnut Brown
Hardware: Silver-tone
Dimensions: 35 x 27 x 15 cm
Blind Stamp: Square M (2009)

Condition Report:
Pristine pre-owned condition (99% New). This bag is in exceptional, original condition, beautifully maintaining its shape with virtually no signs of wear. Please review all photos carefully to appreciate its pristine state.

Style Notes:
Exuding an effortless 'old money' aesthetic, this Atlas 35 is a rare vintage treasure with a minimalist French charm. A sophisticated alternative to the classic bowling bag silhouette, it offers a relaxed and chic vibe for your daily OOTD. An incredibly unique piece that ensures your style remains distinct and unparalleled. Offered at an amazing price!
